property.name: java.library.path
property.value:

testcase.name: runScenario["Login with user testuser", "DemoQA Login"](1)
testcase.system-out:
Feature file generated successfully!
Scenario: Login with user testuser &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/generatedLogin.feature:3&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser is on login page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.openBrowser()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32muser enters username &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"testuser"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m and password &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Password123!"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.navigateTo(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mclicks on login button&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.clicks_on_login_button()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mlogin result should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"success"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.validateTitle(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details. ERROR StatusLogger Log4j2 could not find a logging implementation. Please add log4j-core to the classpath. Using SimpleLogger to log to the console... Apr 07, 2026 12:23:11 PM org.openqa.selenium.remote.tracing.opentelemetry.OpenTelemetryTracer createTracer INFO: Using OpenTelemetry for tracing
